title: taraxacum crocinum
intro: Taraxacum crocinum, also known as the dandelion, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and a bitter taste, often found in lawns and meadows. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum crocinum lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, aid in digestion, and help lower blood pressure, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum crocinum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsules, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
